scripts.test:mobile:functional: playwright test tests/e2e --project="Mobile Chrome" --project="Mobile Safari" --project="Mobile Small"
scripts.test:mobile:layout: playwright test tests/layout --project="Mobile Chrome" --project="Mobile Safari" --project="Mobile Small"
scripts.test:mobile:text: playwright test tests/text --project="Mobile Chrome" --project="Mobile Safari" --project="Mobile Small"
scripts.test:mobile:visual: playwright test tests/visual --project="Mobile Chrome" --project="Mobile Safari" --project="Mobile Small"
scripts.test:mobile:visual:update: playwright test tests/visual --project="Mobile Chrome" --project="Mobile Safari" --project="Mobile Small" --update-snapshots
scripts.test:mobile:motion: playwright test tests/motion --project="Mobile Chrome" --project="Mobile Safari" --project="Mobile Small"
scripts.test:mobile:regression: playwright test tests/regression --project="Mobile Chrome" --project="Mobile Safari" --project="Mobile Small"
scripts.test:mobile:a11y: playwright test tests/a11y --project="Mobile Chrome" --project="Mobile Safari" --project="Mobile Small"
scripts.test:mobile:full: npm run test:mobile:functional && npm run test:mobile:layout && npm run test:mobile:text && npm run test:mobile:regression && npm run test:mobile:motion && npm run test:mobile:a11y && npm run test:mobile:visual && npm run test:mobile:perf
scripts.test:mobile:ci: npm run build && npm run test:mobile:full && npm run lhci && npm run size
scripts.perf:all: npm run build && concurrently -k -s first "npm:start" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run lhci && npm run test:e2e:mobile && npm run size"
